name: Shailendra Kumar
title: Senior Software Engineer & Team Lead
tagline: Building scalable SaaS platforms with PHP, Symfony & Laravel
summary: Senior PHP Engineer & Team Lead with 7+ years building and scaling web applications (Symfony, Laravel, Yii2) for US-based clients. Led delivery for teams of up to 6 engineers across full Agile SDLC; cut API review cycles by 40% and improved system performance by 30% through caching and query optimization. Skilled at pairing hands-on architecture work with AI-assisted development (Cursor, GitHub Copilot) to speed up delivery without sacrificing code quality.
